name: Raisin Pineapple Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and vanilla until light and fluffy.
2. Add sugar to the mixture and continue creaming until well combined.
3. Incorporate the egg into the mixture, ensuring it's fully mixed in.
4. Stir in raisins and crushed pineapple.
5. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto greased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 12-15 minutes in a preheated oven set to 375°F (190°C).
9. Turn off the oven when cookies are done and remove from sheets.
